calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Hearing Prove Up
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

James R. Forbes, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, EAS CONSULTING GROUP, LLC.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) WEB2WEB2 MARKETING, INC., dba ACTEVA also doing business as ACTEVA.COM.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-50 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $48,368.02
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00

Attorney's Fees: $5,500.00
Costs: $670.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $54,538.02
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Continued To Jul-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Continued To Apr-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
